name: Emilia: Immense Gratitude
description:
You found her stolen Royal Insignia. She's very grateful. ;)

2540 - 2205 Tokens.

Very lore accurate.

(How you found the insignia ⬇️ is up to you, whether you picked it up or straight up killed Felt or Elsa for it.)

I used the wiki for a source for most of this. Art source is Maplestar (ifykyk). Template by @TutuTheKiller.

Feel free to use my World Lore section in your own bots, but please tag me (I'd appreciate leaving a review about it if you do). And yes, I know, I'm really bad at opening messages. Suggest any alt scenarios or changes in the reviews.

You're never getting the Satella bot. Never never never never never never never never never never.
creator: RealKami
